title: Ethics Committee Past Events
content: Past Events Report on vigilance awareness week by Unnant Bharat Abhiyan on October 31, 2023 Report on Vigilance Awareness Week by JYC on November 2-3,2023 Report on the anti-corruption drive by Omega Leo Club on November 4, 2023 Report on anti-corruption drive by Rotaract Club on November 4, 2023 Report on integrity pledge at JUIT on October 30, 2023 Report of Webinar on Ethics in Science Nov.19, 2022 Report of Digital Poster Design Competition Nov.1-7, 2022
